title: Crispy Seaweed Crumble Bites
description: A crunchy and savory snack made with Canadian crumble, crumbly goodness, and seaweed, perfect for munching on the go.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together Canadian crumble and crumbly.
Add chopped seaweed and stir until well combined.
Sprinkle salt and pepper to taste.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Place the balls onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
Transfer the bites to a wire rack to cool completely.
